phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Málaga bus platform is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la plataforma para Málaga?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DOHN-deh eh-STAH lah plah-tah-FOHR-mah pah-rah MAH-lah-gah?

likely_response.local: Andén 3, junto a la cafetería principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: ahn-DÉN HOON-toh AH LAH kah-feh-teh-RÍ-ah preen-thee-PAHL
likely_response.translation_en: Platform number three, at the back on the left.

responses.english: Platform number three, at the back on the left.
responses.phonetic: ahn-DÉN HOON-toh AH LAH kah-feh-teh-RÍ-ah preen-thee-PAHL
responses.french: Andén 3, junto a la cafetería principal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy tickets to White Villages
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde compro billetes para los Pueblos Blancos?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh KOHM-proh bee-YEH-tehs pah-rah lohs PWEH-blohs BLAHN-kohs?

likely_response.local: En la taquilla 2, junto a la puerta
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH tah-k-EEL-lah HOON-toh AH LAH poo-EHR-tah
likely_response.translation_en: At ticket counter number two, in front of you.

responses.english: At ticket counter number two, in front of you.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH tah-k-EEL-lah HOON-toh AH LAH poo-EHR-tah
responses.french: En la taquilla 2, junto a la puerta

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the luggage storage is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿hay consigna de equipaje en la estación?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, AH-ee kon-seen-YAH deh eh-kee-PAH-heh en lah es-tah-SYOHN?

likely_response.local: Sí, está junto a la salida principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: SÍ EHSTÁ HOON-toh AH LAH sah-LEE-dah preen-thee-PAHL
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, it is next to the main exit.

responses.english: Yes, it is next to the main exit.
responses.phonetic: SÍ EHSTÁ HOON-toh AH LAH sah-LEE-dah preen-thee-PAHL
responses.french: Sí, está junto a la salida principal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if buses to Seville are running today
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿hay autobuses a Sevilla circulando hoy?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, eye ow-toh-BOO-sehs ah seh-VEE-yah seer-koo-LEE-sahn-doh oy?

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, according to the departure board.

responses.english: Yes, according to the departure board.
